case_title: THE SAGRES COMPANY, ASSIGNEE VS. DAK JEH et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-07-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-26-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-10-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-07-2004 CONTINUED TO MAR-10-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). JAN-07-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST ANGIE C. HONG, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-10-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-26-2004. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-28-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ANGIE C. HONG, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-28-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-13-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARGARET DEL COTO, CSR#8493. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2004 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
